leadText: Bombirdier (Japanese: オトシドリ Otoshidori) is a dual-type Flying/Dark Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Bombirdier holding its apron, which it uses to carry various items Bombirdier is a white avian Pokémon resembling a stork. It has black slanted eyes with black eyeliner-like markings around them, a long reddish pink beak with a rounded bump on the tip, and a small fan-like crest on the back of its head. It has a long neck and tall, thin, reddish pink legs, with three toes facing forward and one toe facing backward on each foot. Its claws are black, as are the feathers on the tips of its wings, on its lower body, and on the inside of its tail, which has a squared end. Hanging from Bombirdier's chest is a long white apron made of its own shed feathers, which droops down past its legs. When flying, Bombirdier holds the end of this apron in its beak. It uses the apron to gather food, such as Basculin , and bring them to its nest. Bombirdier also gathers various objects such as rocks in its apron, which it then drops from high places for fun. It particularly enjoys dropping objects that cause loud noises. A giant Bombirdier that lives in Paldea 's West Province (Area One) , feeding on Bitter Herba Mystica , is known as the Open Sky Titan . Bombirdier is the only known Pokémon that can have Rocky Payload as its Ability .

It became a Titan Pokémon after consuming some Herba Mystica . The player and Arven eventually found it in West Province (Area One) to find the Herba Mystica it guards and defeated it, forcing it to flee. After both took its Herba Mystica, Bombirdier became a normal-sized Pokémon once again. After this, it can be rematched in its original location, and will have the Titan Mark when captured. Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation IX. Generation IX Paldea #290 Kitakami #134 Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun. Violet Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry HZ070 Bombirdier Liko's Rotom Phone Bombirdier, the Item Drop Pokémon. A Flying and Dark type. Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bring food back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.
